Care Lab s provides electrical installation services such as power quality analysis studies, electrical safety inspections, simulations of electrical system design, and research and analysis of power systems. Our team of electrical experts performs load flow and short circuit studies, protective device coordination studies, harmonic emission and filter design studies, transient analysis, and network stability studies using ETAP (Electrical Transient Analysis Program) , the premier tool for power system transient analysis. To build and offer the best power compensation and solutions, it allows us to communicate directly with our consumers.

Every industrial or commercial structure must have an electrical system that is reliable, consistent, and well-maintained. Even a brief loss of electricity can result in serious issues, including extended downtime, critical equipment damage, and expensive repairs. Your building’s power system may undergo routine inspections to make sure it is dependable, safe, and efficient in both typical and unexpected circumstances.

A power system needs to be thoroughly analyzed at every stage of design, installation, and operation. We will investigate and examine the power system using the ETAP program to ascertain how it will function both normally and when a problem emerges suddenly. It is an analysis of engineering research that examines how an electric power system reacts to transient, dynamic, and static events over a range of timescales.

It is possible to undertake a variety of studies to determine the state of the electrical system at your location. It might be a part of a report that analyses the power system. Here are a few examples of these:
The electrical safety program is one example of how it aids organizations in establishing a standard for facility operation. These investigations may show that activities are trustworthy and safe .

You may determine the voltages and currents in different network segments using load flow studies, and then choose the appropriate rated equipment. You may find information about a power system’s voltages and currents, as well as how much power is being used and its power factor, using ETAP’s load flow function.

Short-circuit studies are required to learn how a power system functions when there is a problem. So takes a lot of effort to manually investigate short circuits, but software like ETAP can do it more rapidly and precisely. ETAP is used to simulate system protection devices and calculate the effects of distribution system failures in 3-phase, L-G, L-L, and L-L-G.

The magnitude and form of overvoltage and current spikes caused by lightning strikes and switching activity are evaluated in transient research. You may decide how much insulation and surge protection you need based on the findings.
This study aims to ensure that your system’s security components are functioning appropriately. It demonstrates that they are the correct size and fit the object they are guarding.

In our power system analysis studies, we evaluate the client’s electrical system and offer suggestions for improving its functionality and guaranteeing a steady supply of electricity. We study and analyze the electricity networks of other key cities in addition to Seoul, Busan, Incheon, Daegu and Gwangju. To arrange an assessment and study of your power system or to obtain a price, get in touch with us right once.
